# Tip Calculator — quicktipcalc.cc

## What This Tool Does
Free tip calculator. Instantly calculate restaurant tips, split bills with friends, and choose your tip percentage. No signup required.

## URL
https://quicktipcalc.cc

## Keywords
tip calculator, restaurant tip, bill splitter, tip percentage

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How much should I tip at a restaurant?
A: The standard tip at a restaurant is 15-20% of the pre-tax bill. For excellent service, 20-25% is appreciated. For average service, 15% is acceptable.
Q: What is a 20% tip on $50?
A: A 20% tip on a $50 bill is $10, making your total $60. Use our tip calculator to instantly calculate any tip percentage on any bill amount.
Q: How do I split a bill evenly?
A: Enter your total bill amount, select your tip percentage, then enter the number of people splitting the bill. The calculator will show each person's share including tip.
Q: Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax amount?
A: Most etiquette experts recommend tipping on the pre-tax amount, though tipping on the total is also common. Our calculator lets you input either amount.
Q: What is a good tip for delivery?
A: A standard tip for food delivery is 15-20% of the order total, or a minimum of $3-5 for small orders.

## Disclaimer
This tool is for informational purposes only. Results are estimates and should not replace professional advice.

## Data Privacy
All calculations are performed client-side in the user's browser. No personal data is collected or transmitted.
